caption: A video call interface shows a man in a room with windows in the background. In the initial frames, he is centered in the view, wearing a dark shirt. A small text label reading "Bill Sety" appears at the bottom left of his video feed. As the sequence progresses, a second person enters the call on the right side of the screen. This second individual is a man wearing glasses and a blue button-down shirt. His video feed is accompanied by a text label at the bottom that reads "Jerry Michael". The scene transitions from a single-person view to a split-screen view, showing both participants simultaneously in their respective remote locations. The lighting remains consistent, and the participants appear to be sitting still while engaging in the digital meeting.
